Off Calendar Jan-06-2014 Continued To Feb-03-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF CSAA INSURANCE EXCHANGE's motion To Vacate Trial Date And motion To Transfer And Consolidate Actions In Superior Court Limited Jurisdiction is continued to February 3, 2014 per agreement of all the parties. The moving party is instructed to provide a courtesy copy of an executed proof of service to contestdept302tr@sftc.org in advance of the hearing. The proof of service submitted with the moving papers was not signed or dated. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Tony Vaughn, CSR #6185
